description_long: This object consists of four heavily damaged and rusted sedans, each with significant wear, dents, and missing or deformed parts. The vehicles display a range of colors, including faded blue, brown, and white, with extensive rust and grime covering most surfaces. The front ends are particularly crushed and deformed, with headlights and grilles either missing or barely recognizable. The windows are opaque and appear shattered or covered in grime, and the tires are either missing or flattened. The overall appearance suggests these sedans have been abandoned for a long time, possibly in a junkyard or post-apocalyptic urban environment. The group arrangement and similar damage patterns indicate they may have been stacked or compressed together.
description: A group of four severely damaged, rusted sedans with crushed fronts and faded, dirty exteriors in blue, brown, and white tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crushed and deformed hoods, missing or broken headlights, and extensive rust and dirt on all four sedans.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the compressed and stacked arrangement, with visible roof dents, missing tires, and heavy rust along the sides.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the faded and dented trunks, broken or missing taillights, and more rust and grime on the back panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the damaged doors, collapsed roofs, and further evidence of missing or deformed wheels.
